name: Overnight Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds pork sausage, fried and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the last two in a large bowl.
2. Grease a 9x13 inch pan and pour the mixture into it.
3. Set aside overnight, covered.
4. Before baking, mix well 1 can cream of mushroom soup with 1/2 cup milk.
5. Pour this mixture over the top of the quiche.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, uncovered.
